subject: duration of chaos
fact: Hillsfar had been suffering from weeks of chaos prior to the party's victory.

subject: crafting duration
fact: The custom armor for the owlbear will take several days to complete.
source_quote: The work would take several days

subject: rest duration
fact: The party settled into a tavern to rest and recover for several days.
source_quote: After a few days of rest

subject: meeting timeline
fact: Charles directed the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave in a day or so.

subject: Pass Without Trace range
fact: The Pass Without Trace spell grants a stealth bonus to the party within 30 feet.

subject: owlbear armor cost
fact: The custom scale mail armor for the owlbear costs 200 gold pieces.
source_quote: at a cost of 200 gold pieces

subject: Solom Ned'razak level
fact: Solom Ned'razak is described as an 18th level wizard.

subject: party level up
fact: The party levels up to 10th level.

subject: Daein stealth bonus
fact: Daein realizes he now has a plus 20 stealth bonus.

subject: Akritas stealth bonus
fact: Akritas reveals she can cast Pass Without Trace, granting the party a plus 10 to stealth.
source_quote: granting the entire party a plus 10 to stealth

subject: Bramgrim armor class
fact: Bramgrim's Mithral Plate armor increases his armor class to 20.

subject: Daein armor class
fact: Daein's Plate Mail +1 increases his armor class to 21.

subject: Akritas armor class
fact: Akritas's Studded Leather +1 armor brings her armor class to 16.

subject: owlbear armor class
fact: The custom scale mail armor will increase the owlbear's armor class to 15.
source_quote: increase the owlbear's armor class to 15
